title: ononis repens var. brachystachya
intro: Ononis repens var. brachystachya, also known as Burmed Burmed Restharrow, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Ononis repens var. brachystachya include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating urinary problems. The plant is typically used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
